channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.113】Visual Studio 代码 1.113
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.113 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.113 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Windows stack limit checking retrospective: arm64, also known as AArch64】Windows 堆栈限制检查回顾：arm64，也称为 AArch64
item.description: 【Our survey of stack limit checking wraps up with arm64, also known as AArch64. The stack limit checking takes two forms, one simple version for pure arm64 processes, and a more complex version for Arm64EC. I'm going to look at the simple version. The complex version differs in that it has to check whether the code is running on the】我们对堆栈限制检查的调查以arm64（也称为AArch64）结束。堆栈限制检查采用两种形式，一种是针对纯 arm64 进程的简单版本，另一种是针对 Arm64EC 的更复杂版本。我要看看简单的版本。复杂版本的不同之处在于它必须检查代码是否在

item.title: 【Accelerating .NET MAUI Development with AI Agents】使用 AI 代理加速 .NET MAUI 开发
item.description: 【This is a guest blog from Syncfusion. Learn more about the free, open-source Syncfusion Toolkit for .NET MAUI. As a proud partner with the .NET MAUI team, Syncfusion is excited to share how custom-built AI agents are dramatically improvin】这是 Syncfusion 的客座博客。了解有关适用于 .NET MAUI 的免费开源 Syncfusion Toolkit 的更多信息。作为 .NET MAUI 团队的自豪合作伙伴，Syncfusion 很高兴分享定制的 AI 代理如何显着改进

item.title: 【Remote MCP Server preview in Microsoft Foundry】Microsoft Foundry 中的远程 MCP 服务器预览
item.description: 【Earlier this week we release the public preview for our Azure DevOps MCP Server. Today we are excited to let you know that the Azure DevOps MCP Server is now available to use in Microsoft Foundry. For those who are new to Foundry, Micro】本周早些时候，我们发布了 Azure DevOps MCP 服务器的公共预览版。今天，我们很高兴地通知您，Azure DevOps MCP 服务器现已可在 Microsoft Foundry 中使用。对于那些刚刚接触 Foundry、Micro 的人

item.title: 【Windows stack limit checking retrospective: amd64, also known as x86-64】Windows 堆栈限制检查回顾：amd64，也称为 x86-64
item.description: 【Our survey of stack limit checking reaches the modern day with amd64, also known as x86-64. This time, there are two versions of the function, one for user mode and one for kernel mode. We'll look at the user mode version. Actually, there are two user mode versions. One is in msvcrt, the legacy runtime. ; on entry】我们对堆栈限制检查的调查已扩展到现代的 amd64（也称为 x86-64）。这次，该函数有两个版本，一种用于用户模式，一种用于内核模式。我们将看看用户模式版本。实际上，有两个用户模式版本。其中之一是在遗留运行时 msvcrt 中。 ;进入时

item.title: 【From Azure IoT Operations Data Processor Pipelines to Dataflows】从 Azure IoT 操作数据处理器管道到数据流
item.description: 【We recently completed an 18-month journey building an event detection system at the edge with Azure IoT Operations (AIO). The goal was simple to describe but complex to execute: use a Vision Model to detect real-world events, then raise confidence by correlating that signal with other data sources—from indu】我们最近完成了为期 18 个月的旅程，使用 Azure IoT Operations (AIO) 在边缘构建事件检测系统。目标描述起来很简单，但执行起来很复杂：使用视觉模型来检测现实世界的事件，然后通过将该信号与来自工业界的其他数据源相关联来提高置信度。

item.title: 【Announcing PowerShell 7.6 (LTS) GA Release】宣布推出 PowerShell 7.6 (LTS) GA 版本
item.description: 【We're excited to announce the General Availability of PowerShell 7.6, the next Long Term Support (LTS) release of PowerShell. PowerShell 7.6 is built on .NET 10 (LTS), continuing the alignment between PowerShell and the modern .NET platform. PowerShell 7.6 includes reliability improvements across the】我们很高兴地宣布 PowerShell 7.6 全面上市，这是 PowerShell 的下一个长期支持 (LTS) 版本。 PowerShell 7.6 基于 .NET 10 (LTS) 构建，继续保持 PowerShell 与现代 .NET 平台之间的一致性。 PowerShell 7.6 包括跨领域的可靠性改进

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.112】Visual Studio 代码 1.112
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.112 Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.112 中的新增功能 阅读全文

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.112】Visual Studio 代码 1.112
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.112 Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.112 中的新增功能 阅读全文

item.title: 【When Infrastructure Scales But Understanding Doesn't】当基础设施扩展但理解却无法扩展时
item.description: 【We all know this, even if we don't like to admit it: modern infrastructure can scale infinitely, but human understanding doesn't. We've all seen it happen - organizations going from managing dozens of servers to thousands of containers, from deploying weekly to deploying hundreds of times per day, from serving thousands of users to millions】我们都知道这一点，即使我们不愿意承认：现代基础设施可以无限扩展，但人类的理解却不能。我们都见过这种情况的发生 - 组织从管理数十台服务器到数千个容器，从每周部署到每天部署数百次，从服务数千用户到数百万用户
